task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the Vicidial Admin system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vicidial administration web interface is visible, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the cloning process from the 'SENPOLL' campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Copy Campaign' or similar cloning screen is visible with 'SENPOLL' selected or entered as the source campaign.

task_completion.description: Verify the new campaign was created with the correct ID and Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The campaign settings or creation page shows the Campaign ID as 'SEN_WEST' and Campaign Name as 'Senate Polling West'.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific required settings were applied to the new campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The campaign settings page for 'SEN_WEST' shows Active set to 'Y', Campaign CallerID set to '3105550199', and Manual Dial Prefix set to '9'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new campaign inherited the correct tuning parameters from the source campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The campaign settings page for 'SEN_WEST' shows Dial Method as 'ADAPT_TAPERED', Auto Dial Level as '1.25', Dial Timeout as '28', Drop Call Seconds as '5', and Voicemail as '85026666'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vicidial web GUI to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser navigating the Vicidial interface, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the Vicidial admin system, not a text editor, mock-up, or static HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were actually submitted and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of form submission, such as a success message, or the settings are visible on a saved configuration page rather than just typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
